# MCP Uptime Ledger

Paid remote MCP for server uptime checks, schema validation, auth failure detection, SLA receipts, and status report exports.

Website: https://mcpuptimeledger.clauxel.com/
MCP endpoint: https://mcpuptimeledger.clauxel.com/mcp
Server card: https://mcpuptimeledger.clauxel.com/server-card.json
Docs: https://github.com/clauxel/mcp-uptime-ledger-mcp

Use case: Monitor MCP server uptime, auth failures, schema drift, and SLA evidence.
Authentication: Bearer token required for production use.
Tools: check_mcp_server_uptime, validate_tool_schema, detect_auth_failure, issue_sla_receipt, export_status_report
